title: ensure_param_file tmp path uses with_extension producing .params.tmp double-extension
description: params.rs line 248: path.with_extension('params.tmp') on 'sapling-spend.params' produces 'sapling-spend.params.tmp' — double-extension where 'params.tmp' replaces the final extension component. Harmless but confusing to a reader who expects with_extension to produce 'sapling-spend.tmp'. Suggested: path.with_file_name(format\!("{}.tmp", path.file_name()...)) to make intent explicit.
